name: @jeldon/entity-presence
description: Off-site brand-mention + per-engine citation-pattern signals — the biggest AEO lever on-page-only optimization can't reach. Checks NAP/name consistency across third-party surfaces (Reddit / Wikipedia / forums / comparison pages), exposes documented per-engine source affinities (Reddit → Perplexity, Wikipedia → ChatGPT, structured depth → Claude), and assembles an off-site entity-presence report. NEW module — designed from docs/AEO-PLAYBOOK.md, not ported from the source system.
